name: chokepoint-edr-bypass-emulation
description: Emulate service stop/disable, handle open to security process, driver install event. Expected: EID 10 (security process handle), WEL 7036/7040 (service state).

detectionQueries.name: Security Process Handle Access
detectionQueries.query: DeviceProcessEvents | where Timestamp > ago(1h) | where FileName =~ 'lsass.exe' or FileName =~ 'MsMpEng.exe' | where ActionType == 'ProcessAccess' | project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, InitiatingProcessFileName

detectionQueries.name: Service State Changes
detectionQueries.query: DeviceEvents | where Timestamp > ago(1h) | where ActionType == 'ServiceTerminated' or ActionType == 'ServiceConfigChanged' | project Timestamp, DeviceName, ActionType, ServiceName

detectionQueries.name: Service Installation
detectionQueries.query: SecurityEvent | where EventID == 7045 | where ServiceType == 'kernel' | project TimeGenerated, Computer, ServiceName, ServiceType, ImagePath
